## Confections.Converters.chocolateSpec variable

Converter for IChocolateSpec (IIdsWithPreferred<IngredientId>). Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in ids.

**Signature:**

```typescript
chocolateSpec: Converter<IChocolateSpec>
```
